title: dracontium annulatum
intro: Dracontium annulatum, also known as the ringed dragon arum, is a plant species native to tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Dracontium annulatum include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as wounds and eczema. The herbal preparation of this plant typically involves drying the roots and leaves, which can be used to make teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
